TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Macedonia u Macedonia (ť¶¨ŚÖ∂ť†ď, Ma-Ce-Dun) sa i labu nu Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤), itiza i 41 50 N, 22 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 25,713 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 25,433 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 280 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 2,100,025. kakalukan umah sa 44.30%, kilakilangan umah sa 39.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 15.90%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Skopje . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 8 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Stevo Pendarovski, micakat a demiad sa i 2019 a mihcaan 5 bulad 12 demiad. ayda nu laylay nikudan ni kilisetu enem (6) a seci tu lawpes Sela-fu a binacadan malingatu malimad tayda i Maci-tun (Macedonia mueneng, misumad tu sasinggiaan nuheni tu tunceciw . nikudan nikilisetu siwa (9) a seci Maci-tun (Macedonia Slavic wan-kuo mapatideng, tinii i cacay a bataan (10) a se-ci caaysa tu lekal. Maci-tun (Macedonia madebung nu hekalay a binacadan sawni paliyuntu i hekalay a tademaw mami kuwan, namaka sabaw tu cacay a (11) a seci sa, Maci-tun (Macedonia a tademaw kinapina palekal tu sakaada, malawpetu numi kuwanay, namaka cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1392) a mihcaan Macedonia mala madebung nu E'tuman Tuelci-tikuo mumikuwanay makaala tu lima a secian kunipikuwan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1913) a mihcaan sakatusa anikalpacawan tu Balkans , mahedek satu malepacaw idaw kunikasasulit tu Pucia-lesete' a kiyakuan , u Pawcia-liya (Bulgaria , Si-la (Greece atu Sayel-wiya (Serbia tatuluay a kanatal makakilac tu Maci-tun (Macedonia . 1919 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (1919) a mihcaan sakacacay nu kitakitay a nikalepacawan nikudan palu tatengan misuayaw tu Paw, Si, Say nu tuluay a kanatal mikilac tu Maci-tun . 1944ŚĻī8śúą" . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat (1944) a mihcaan waluay a bulad patideng nu "Nande-lahu ming-culan-pan ", Maci-tun (Macedonia payniyadu' a mikeliday panutek mala Nanse-lahu lan-pan . 1945ŚĻī4 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku lima (1945) a mihcaan sepat a bulad Nanlan Cong-tung ci "Dituo " pacakaten nuheni ku Maci-tun (Macedonia mala Nanse-lahu lan-pan enemay a micumud nu kunghe-kuo , tanektektu kunipisiteked nu Maci-tun . 1991 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1991) a mihcaan Nanlan maliwasak, Maci-tun kunhe-kuo nama hekal nikasasuadaan, kapahsa i siwa a bulad walu a demiad mihapu misitekae kamisa, tawya a mihcaan sabaw tu cacay a bulad sabaw tu pitu a demiad Maci-tun kunhe-kuo patideng tu baluhay a sian-fa . 1993ŚĻī4śúą8 Former Yugoslavia Republic of Macedonia (FYROM)šĻčŚźćÁ®ĪŚä†ŚÖ•ŤĀĮŚźąŚúč. cacay a malebud siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1993 ) a mihcaan sepat a bulad walu a demiad inuayawan a Nanse-lahu Ma-citun kunghe-kuo "Former Yugoslavia Republic of Macedonia", (FYROM) a ngangan ku sapicumud tu lanhekuo. 2019ŚĻī2śúą12 ". tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (2019) a mihcaan tusa a bulad sabaw tu tusa a demiad makaykictu atu Si-la a nganganan nikacenlawan tatenga masumad ku ngangan u " peimaci-tun-kunhe-kuo " cence nu ayda . peimaci-tun nuayawan " Maci-tun " sinfa itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1991) a mihcaan asiwantan. . Cung-tung u tadenga'ay nu kanatal a sakakaay nu hitay amikeliday, lima a mihcaan kunikala Cung-tung, u binawlan a tademaw ku misingkuway a patideng, Cung-tung anisingkiwan a kina tusaan a misingkuw kiya matatungus. . cen-ti śĒŅťęĒ u ihun mincuce. i labu u Cun-li atu katuuday a sakakaay nikapulungan, mikuwan tu kakawawen. . Cun-li kumi kuwanay tu kawaw, u satalakaway nu tapang, u kuohu a katuuday nu tan ku tahekalay, aw Cung-tun ku panganganay kiya midui ku kuohu. . kasa'timan a kawaw han: pasayda i kuohu patahekal tu sasakamuen, patahekal tu hulic, palutadenga tu nutaw a sihu, atu nutaw anikalecabayan, patahekal panganga tu sakay hekal a sakakaay. Maci-tun kunhe-kuo atu biyaw nu kanatal Si-la (Greece masasualaw tu pinganganan (Si-la ilabu nu kanatal idaw ku Maci-tun sen (Macedonia niyadu', Si-la (Greece a tademaw saan tu Maci-tun a ngangan micayatay tu Si-la (Greece a kawaw), nina tusaay a kanatal caay kasasu bahel ku belbel, nina tusaay a kanatal namaka cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1991) a mihcaan Maci-tun (Macedonia misiteked satu mabiyalaw tu. (Prespa Agreement). mangalay misakapah tu nikacinglawan, nina tusaay a kanatal namaka tusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan sa, i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2018) a mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tu tusa a demiad masasulit tu Lasepa'a sasulitan (Prespa Agreement) a kiyakuan. nikasasulitan katukuh i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (2019) a mihcaan, u Si-la (Greece patikuen nuheni i O-mum (European Union atu Peieyi misuaay tu Ma-cutun (Macedonia nipicumudan tu funciecun , Maci-tun kunhe-kuo i nuydaan a mihcaan nu tusa a bulad sabaw tu tusa a demiad tatengan misumad tu ngangan u peimaci-tun kunhe-kuo .

r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa **,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa *,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (****) a mińß ¶aan ma ¶…ôdonia mar~…ĺa mad…ôbuŇč nu …ô Ē~ °tuman tu…ôr~…ĺ ¶i-tikuo mumikuwanaj makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶ian tan…ôkt…ôktu kunipisit…ôk…ôd nu ma ¶i-tun . **** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan nanr~…ĺan mar~…ĺiwasak, ma ¶i-tun kunńß…ô-kuo nama ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan ma ¶i-tun (ma ¶…ôdonia misit…ôk…ôd satu mabijar~…ĺaw tu. (pr…ôspa agr…ô…ôm…ônt). maŇčar~…ĺaj misakapańß tu nika ¶iŇčr~…ĺawan, nina tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ namaka tusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan sa, i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad sabaw tu tusa a d…ômiad masasur~…ĺit tu r~…ĺas…ôpa Ē~ °a sasur~…ĺitan (pr…ôspa agr…ô…ôm…ônt) a kijakuan. nikasasur~…ĺitan katukuńß i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku siwa (****) a mińß ¶aan, u si-r~…ĺa (gr…ô…ô ¶…ô patiku…ôn nuńß…ôni i o-mum (…ôurop…ôan union atu p…ôi…ôi misuaaj tu ma- ¶utun (ma ¶…ôdonia nipi ¶umudan tu fun ¶i…ô ¶un , ma ¶i-tun kunńß…ô-kuo i nujdaan a mińß ¶aan nu tusa a bur~…ĺad sabaw tu tusa a d…ômiad tat…ôŇčan misumad tu ŇčaŇčan u p…ôima ¶i-tun kunńß…ô-kuo .
S.FORM: Macedonia u Macedonia (ť¶¨ŚÖ∂ť†ď, Ma-Ce-Dun) sa i labu nu Europe (O-Cuo ś≠źśī≤), itiza i 41 50 N, 22 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 25,713 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 25,433 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 280 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 2,100,025. kakalukan umah sa 44.30%, kilakilangan umah sa 39.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 15.90%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Skopje . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 8 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Stevo Pendarovski, micakat a demiad sa i 2019 a mihcaan 5 bulad 12 demiad. ayda nu laylay nikudan ni kilisetu enem (6) a seci tu lawpes Sela-fu a binacadan malingatu malimad tayda i Maci-tun (Macedonia mueneng, misumad tu sasinggiaan nuheni tu tunceciw . nikudan nikilisetu siwa (9) a seci Maci-tun (Macedonia Slavic wan-kuo mapatideng, tinii i cacay a bataan (10) a se-ci caaysa tu lekal. Maci-tun (Macedonia madebung nu hekalay a binacadan sawni paliyuntu i hekalay a tademaw mami kuwan, namaka sabaw tu cacay a (11) a seci sa, Maci-tun (Macedonia a tademaw kinapina palekal tu sakaada, malawpetu numi kuwanay, namaka cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1392) a mihcaan Macedonia mala madebung nu E'tuman Tuelci-tikuo mumikuwanay makaala tu lima a secian kunipikuwan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1913) a mihcaan sakatusa anikalpacawan tu Balkans , mahedek satu malepacaw idaw kunikasasulit tu Pucia-lesete' a kiyakuan , u Pawcia-liya (Bulgaria , Si-la (Greece atu Sayel-wiya (Serbia tatuluay a kanatal makakilac tu Maci-tun (Macedonia . 1919 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (1919) a mihcaan sakacacay nu kitakitay a nikalepacawan nikudan palu tatengan misuayaw tu Paw, Si, Say nu tuluay a kanatal mikilac tu Maci-tun . 1944ŚĻī8śúą" . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku sepat (1944) a mihcaan waluay a bulad patideng nu "Nande-lahu ming-culan-pan ", Maci-tun (Macedonia payniyadu' a mikeliday panutek mala Nanse-lahu lan-pan . 1945ŚĻī4 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku lima (1945) a mihcaan sepat a bulad Nanlan Cong-tung ci "Dituo " pacakaten nuheni ku Maci-tun (Macedonia mala Nanse-lahu lan-pan enemay a micumud nu kunghe-kuo , tanektektu kunipisiteked nu Maci-tun . 1991 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1991) a mihcaan Nanlan maliwasak, Maci-tun kunhe-kuo nama hekal nikasasuadaan, kapahsa i siwa a bulad walu a demiad mihapu misitekae kamisa, tawya a mihcaan sabaw tu cacay a bulad sabaw tu pitu a demiad Maci-tun kunhe-kuo patideng tu baluhay a sian-fa . 1993ŚĻī4śúą8 Former Yugoslavia Republic of Macedonia (FYROM)šĻčŚźćÁ®ĪŚä†ŚÖ•ŤĀĮŚźąŚúč. cacay a malebud siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1993 ) a mihcaan sepat a bulad walu a demiad inuayawan a Nanse-lahu Ma-citun kunghe-kuo "Former Yugoslavia Republic of Macedonia", (FYROM) a ngangan ku sapicumud tu lanhekuo. 2019ŚĻī2śúą12 ". tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (2019) a mihcaan tusa a bulad sabaw tu tusa a demiad makaykictu atu Si-la a nganganan nikacenlawan tatenga masumad ku ngangan u " peimaci-tun-kunhe-kuo " cence nu ayda . peimaci-tun nuayawan " Maci-tun " sinfa itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1991) a mihcaan asiwantan. . Cung-tung u tadenga'ay nu kanatal a sakakaay nu hitay amikeliday, lima a mihcaan kunikala Cung-tung, u binawlan a tademaw ku misingkuway a patideng, Cung-tung anisingkiwan a kina tusaan a misingkuw kiya matatungus. . cen-ti śĒŅťęĒ u ihun mincuce. i labu u Cun-li atu katuuday a sakakaay nikapulungan, mikuwan tu kakawawen. . Cun-li kumi kuwanay tu kawaw, u satalakaway nu tapang, u kuohu a katuuday nu tan ku tahekalay, aw Cung-tun ku panganganay kiya midui ku kuohu. . kasa'timan a kawaw han: pasayda i kuohu patahekal tu sasakamuen, patahekal tu hulic, palutadenga tu nutaw a sihu, atu nutaw anikalecabayan, patahekal panganga tu sakay hekal a sakakaay. Maci-tun kunhe-kuo atu biyaw nu kanatal Si-la (Greece masasualaw tu pinganganan (Si-la ilabu nu kanatal idaw ku Maci-tun sen (Macedonia niyadu', Si-la (Greece a tademaw saan tu Maci-tun a ngangan micayatay tu Si-la (Greece a kawaw), nina tusaay a kanatal caay kasasu bahel ku belbel, nina tusaay a kanatal namaka cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1991) a mihcaan Maci-tun (Macedonia misiteked satu mabiyalaw tu. (Prespa Agreement). mangalay misakapah tu nikacinglawan, nina tusaay a kanatal namaka tusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan sa, i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2018) a mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tu tusa a demiad masasulit tu Lasepa'a sasulitan (Prespa Agreement) a kiyakuan. nikasasulitan katukuh i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa (2019) a mihcaan, u Si-la (Greece patikuen nuheni i O-mum (European Union atu Peieyi misuaay tu Ma-cutun (Macedonia nipicumudan tu funciecun , Maci-tun kunhe-kuo i nuydaan a mihcaan nu tusa a bulad sabaw tu tusa a demiad tatengan misumad tu ngangan u peimaci-tun kunhe-kuo .
